历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 2568 → 2223 → 2541 → 2242 → 2696, showing significant fluctuations with no clear single trend; the 2025 ranking of 2696 is the highest in the past 5 years (most difficult to enter), rising about 454 places compared to 2024, reflecting intensified competition that year; the university's enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province was 35 in 2021, 35 in 2022, 37 in 2023, 37 in 2024, 41 in 2025, and 38 in 2026. In 2026, enrollment decreased by 3 students (-7.3%) compared to 2025, which slightly eases competition and may lead to a drop in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; ranked 51st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, up 5 places from 56th in 2025, showing steady improvement in overall strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; the 2023 reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors dropped 6211 places), but no negative events for this university appeared in the 2026 reputation data, with stable public opinion; Douyin popularity ranked 21st (relatively hot), with comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, moderate to high short video exposure, and acceptable application attention; Aquaculture A+, Marine Science A+, Biology A-, Food Science and Engineering A-, with marine and aquatic disciplines leading nationally, strongly attracting candidates interested in related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering and Automation continue to be highly recommended; the university's science enrollment covers popular directions like Computer Science, Electronic Information, and Automation, which helps attract high-scoring candidates; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000 (uncertain), and based on the recent physics category proportion of about 63%, the number of physics category candidates is approximately 30,200, with a stable candidate scale. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, which has some regional appeal to Qinghai candidates; the university enrolls a small number of students in Qinghai Province (41 in physics category in 2025), accounting for a very low proportion of the national total, making it a small-scale enrollment province, and rankings are easily affected by individual candidate application behavior.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is at a 5-year high, the 2026 enrollment reduction of 3 students slightly eases competition, the Soft Science ranking rise enhances the university's appeal, and the candidate scale is basically stable, it is expected that the minimum ranking for science (physics category) in 2026 will slightly decrease compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2548, with a range of 2166–2930.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2166–2930, it is recommended to mainly apply for Tier 2 majors, with Tier 1 majors as reach and Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2200), focus on reaching for popular Tier 1 majors like Computer Science and Automation; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., beyond 2800), prioritize Tier 3 majors as safety, while also considering Tier 2 mid-level majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 451 → 782 → 642 → 653 → 884, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (larger ranking number = harder to enter). The 2025 ranking of 884 is the highest in the past five years, an increase of about 433 places compared to 2021, indicating intensifying competition. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Qinghai Province was 8 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 13 in 2024, 13 in 2025, and 14 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an expansion of 1 student (+7.7%), which slightly intensifies competition and may cause a small increase in ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 51st, up 5 places from 56th in 2025, indicating continuously strengthening comprehensive strength and increased appeal to liberal arts candidates. In 2023, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (minor language majors saw a ranking drop of 6211), but in 2026 reputation data, no negative events were reported for this university, with stable public opinion. Its Douyin popularity ranks 21st (relatively hot), with a comprehensive popularity of about 2.43 million, indicating moderate to high application attention. It has A+ in Aquaculture and Marine Science, A- in Biology and Food Science and Engineering. Although its liberal arts majors (Chinese Language and Literature, Law, Political Science and Administration, etc.) are not the university's flagship disciplines, the overall appeal of the 985 platform is strong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law and Chinese Language and Literature are socially popular to recommended. Law has obvious advantages for civil service exams, while Chinese Language and Literature offers broad employment prospects. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province General College Entrance Examination is approximately 48,000 (uncertain). Based on the recent history category proportion of about 37%, the estimated number of history category candidates is about 17,800, a slight increase from 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition. Ocean University of China is located in Qingdao, Shandong, an eastern coastal city, which has some regional appeal to liberal arts candidates from Qinghai. The university's enrollment in liberal arts in Qinghai Province is very small (only 14 in 2026), so rankings are easily affected by individual candidate application behavior and are highly volatile.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings, the slight intensification of competition due to the expansion of 1 student in 2026, the small increase in candidate numbers, and the enhanced appeal of the 985 platform, it is expected that the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) in 2026 will continue to rise slightly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 940, with a range of 799–1081.
